pi_items.source: Direct query of VistA database ^PS(55) and ^DPT using Apptainer over the worldvista/vehu container image.

privileged_info_summary: By directly querying the VistA VEHU YottaDB global ^PS(55) for outpatient prescriptions and ^DPT for names, we established the exact ground truth: The patient with the most prescriptions is ZZZRETFIVEFIFTYONE,PATIENT (DFN: 1) with 208 prescriptions. The second highest is ZZZRETIREDTWENTY,PATIENT (DFN: 51) with 94 prescriptions. The third highest is ZZZRETSIXFIFTYNINE,PATIENT (DFN: 206) with 79 prescriptions. The patient records are synthetic test cases from the worldvista dataset.
